masked_ssim_pathology.note: The old method averages SSIM over the whole image after zeroing the outside, so the identical black regions dominate and a destroyed ROI still scores near 1.0. Pinned by tests/test_metrics.py::test_destroyed_roi_cannot_score_near_perfect.

hardened_gate_postmortem_on_turn4.status: POSTMORTEM REPLAY. The live ledger committed turn 4 using gate v1 (target pixel movement + context SSIM). This is gate v2 replayed against the saved artifact; it is not what ran.
